prompt: Vintage scrapbook-style aesthetic collage featuring the attached photo of an attractive man with wavy brown hair, glowing skin, and soft features. He appears thoughtful by a sunset window, wearing a black top, open white shirt, and a minimal necklace. Main scene: sitting at a desk reading a book, surrounded by a coffee cup, retro camera, notebook, and laptop. Vertical composition filled with Polaroid-style photos (travel, beach, studio, smiling portraits). Include torn paper, sticky notes, beige tape, notebook pages, and botanical sketches arranged artistically. Add handwritten motivational English quotes about growth, inner peace, independence, and self-love. Warm beige, brown, and golden palette with soft cinematic lighting, cozy Pinterest moodboard style, ultra-detailed, realistic paper textures, natural shadows, 4K quality. Keep facial features unchanged.
